availability.relocation: No (Greater Long Beach / LAX area only)

compensation.strategy: Use midpoint of posted range; otherwise use market median for title/location; user can override.

common_questions.why_this_role: I’m excited about this role because it blends building reliable systems with improving how teams make decisions. I’ve built pipelines and automated ingestion and monitoring so stakeholders can trust the data and act quickly.
common_questions.strengths: Strong Python/SQL, practical Azure/Fabric experience, and a bias toward automation and clear documentation. I’m comfortable collaborating with non-technical stakeholders.
common_questions.project_proud_of: An end-to-end ingestion + transformation workflow with validation/monitoring that made downstream reporting more reliable and reduced failures.
